name: income.brief
description: Scan F-1-authorized income opportunities — remote freelance gigs, passive income plays, and on-campus jobs. Always states F-1 CPT/OPT authorization rules. Powered by Tyche.

message.description: Request for income opportunities, e.g. 'show me income opportunities as an F-1 student'

execution.note: Routes through Hermes chat to Tyche agent via CONTEXT_MATCHERS

examples: what gigs can I do as an F-1 student?
what passive income plays are F-1 safe?
